description: Faustine Fleuret discusses the impact of regulation on the Web3 industry, emphasizing the need for proportionate policies to foster innovation and mass adoption. She highlights the role of ADAN in shaping effective regulations and the potential for a transformed Web3 landscape in five years, filled with European champions. Fleuret also advises newcomers to the crypto space to be curious and understand the broader implications of crypto assets beyond speculation.
topic_summary: Faustine Fleuret on the future of Web3 and the importance of regulation for innovation and adoption [t=4:72]. She discusses the role of ADAN in shaping policy and encourages young people to explore the diverse aspects of crypto assets [t=119:22].
